# Low Vision Zoom

> Low Vision Zoom is a screen magnifier app for Windows 10 and 11, designed for
> people with low vision. It lives in the system tray. Hold Ctrl and scroll the
> mouse wheel to zoom anywhere in Windows; the view eases in smoothly and pivots
> around the mouse pointer, so users never lose their place on screen. It is an
> alternative to the built-in Windows Magnifier and to ZoomText.

Key facts:

- Platform: Windows 10 and Windows 11
- Price: US $9.99 one-time license (no subscription, no ads)
- Free trial: 7 days, full-featured
- Privacy: works fully offline, collects no data
- Install: Microsoft Store (https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/xpfnwzmxmnp6pv) or direct MSI download from the website
- Languages: website and app localized into 18 languages
- Developer: txtbook LLC

## Pages

- [Home](https://lowvisionzoom.com/): overview, download links, how-to gestures
- [Pricing](https://lowvisionzoom.com/pricing.html): license terms and price
- [Buy](https://lowvisionzoom.com/buy.html): purchase a license
- [Contact](https://lowvisionzoom.com/contact.html): support contact
- [Privacy](https://lowvisionzoom.com/privacy.html): privacy policy (no data collected)
